turns.query: Analyze the pollution situation at air quality station: Construction Building on 2025-06-02.
turns.actual_response:
2025年6月2日，未检索到英文名称“Construction Building”的精确匹配站点；按名称对应关系，本次采用最接近的站点“古冶建材楼”进行分析。该站点当日共有24条小时记录，数据覆盖完整。

当日污染总体处于较轻水平：PM2.5日均值为33.42，小时峰值为76.00；AQI日均值为59.29，AQI峰值为102。PM2.5超过75的小时数为2小时，说明当日仅短时出现细颗粒物偏高过程。

分时段看，污染主要集中在凌晨至上午：
- 00:00—05:00：PM2.5均值51.00，AQI均值74.17，PM2.5最高75；
- 06:00—11:00：PM2.5均值57.67，AQI均值80.50，PM2.5最高76，为全天污染相对最重时段；
- 12:00—17:00：PM2.5均值降至18.33，AQI均值52.83；
- 18:00—23:00：PM2.5均值进一步降至6.67，AQI均值29.67，空气质量明显改善。

全天PM2.5与AQI峰值均出现在06:00，PM2.5为76.00，AQI为102，对应轻度污染水平。空气质量等级小时分布为：优9小时、良13小时、轻度污染2小时。

其他污染物日均水平为：PM10 61.63、SO2 11.71、NO2 19.88、O3 110.92、CO 0.70。PM10小时峰值为119.00。综合来看，当日污染以早晨短时颗粒物升高为主要特征，午后至夜间扩散或污染削减效果明显，未表现为持续性高污染过程。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查询并汇总“Construction Building”站点在 2025-06-02 全日小时数据
query = text("""
WITH target_station AS (
    SELECT id, name
    FROM air_quality_station
    WHERE name = 'Construction Building'
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        h.timestamp,
        h.aqi,
        h.pm2_5,
        h.pm10,
        h.so2,
        h.no2,
        h.o3,
        h.co,
        h.air_quality_level
    FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
    JOIN target_station s ON h.station_id = s.id
    WHERE h.timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-02 00:00:00'
      AND h.timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2025-06-03 00:00:00'
),
summary AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(*)::int AS record_count,
        AVG(pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
        MAX(pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
        AVG(aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
        SUM(CASE WHEN pm2_5 > 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours,
        MIN(pm2_5)::float AS min_pm25,
        AVG(pm10)::float AS mean_pm10,
        MAX(pm10)::float AS max_pm10,
        AVG(so2)::float AS mean_so2,
        AVG(no2)::float AS mean_no2,
        AVG(o3)::float AS mean_o3,
        AVG(co)::float AS mean_co,
        MIN(timestamp) AS first_time,
        MAX(timestamp) AS last_time
    FROM base
),
peak AS (
    SELECT timestamp AS peak_pm25_time, pm2_5 AS peak_pm25, aqi AS peak_pm25_aqi
    FROM base
    WHERE pm2_5 IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY pm2_5 DESC, timestamp
    LIMIT 1
),
level_counts AS (
    SELECT air_quality_level::text AS level, COUNT(*)::int AS hours
    FROM base
    GROUP BY air_quality_level
    ORDER BY hours DESC
)
SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM target_station) AS station_match_count,
    s.*,
    p.peak_pm25_time,
    p.peak_pm25,
    p.peak_pm25_aqi,
    COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_object_agg(level, hours) FROM level_counts), '{}'::jsonb)::text AS level_hours
FROM summary s
LEFT JOIN peak p ON TRUE;
""")

res = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
row = res.iloc[0]

mean_pm25 = float(row["mean_pm25"]) if pd.notna(row["mean_pm25"]) else None
max_pm25 = float(row["max_pm25"]) if pd.notna(row["max_pm25"]) else None
mean_aqi = float(row["mean_aqi"]) if pd.notna(row["mean_aqi"]) else None
exceedance_hours = int(row["exceedance_hours"]) if pd.notna(row["exceedance_hours"]) else 0

print({
    "station_match_count": int(row["station_match_count"]),
    "record_count": int(row["record_count"]),
    "mean_pm25": mean_pm25,
    "max_pm25": max_pm25,
    "mean_aqi": mean_aqi,
    "exceedance_hours": exceedance_hours,
    "min_pm25": None if pd.isna(row["min_pm25"]) else float(row["min_pm25"]),
    "mean_pm10": None if pd.isna(row["mean_pm10"]) else float(row["mean_pm10"]),
    "max_pm10": None if pd.isna(row["max_pm10"]) else float(row["max_pm10"]),
    "mean_so2": None if pd.isna(row["mean_so2"]) else float(row["mean_so2"]),
    "mean_no2": None if pd.isna(row["mean_no2"]) else float(row["mean_no2"]),
    "mean_o3": None if pd.isna(row["mean_o3"]) else float(row["mean_o3"]),
    "mean_co": None if pd.isna(row["mean_co"]) else float(row["mean_co"]),
    "first_time": None if pd.isna(row["first_time"]) else str(row["first_time"]),
    "last_time": None if pd.isna(row["last_time"]) else str(row["last_time"]),
    "peak_pm25_time": None if pd.isna(row["peak_pm25_time"]) else str(row["peak_pm25_time"]),
    "peak_pm25_aqi": None if pd.isna(row["peak_pm25_aqi"]) else int(row["peak_pm25_aqi"]),
    "level_hours": row["level_hours"]
})

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 未精确匹配到英文站名，进一步检索可能的中英文站点名称，并统计目标日期是否有小时空气质量数据
query = text("""
WITH candidates AS (
    SELECT id, name
    FROM air_quality_station
    WHERE lower(name) LIKE '%construction%'
       OR lower(name) LIKE '%building%'
       OR lower(name) LIKE '%build%'
       OR name LIKE '%建%'
       OR name LIKE '%楼%'
       OR name LIKE '%大厦%'
       OR name LIKE '%工地%'
),
stats AS (
    SELECT
        s.id,
        s.name,
        COUNT(h.id)::int AS record_count,
        AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
        MAX(h.pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
        AVG(h.aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
        SUM(CASE WHEN h.pm2_5 > 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours
    FROM candidates s
    LEFT JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h
      ON h.station_id = s.id
     AND h.timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-02 00:00:00'
     AND h.timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2025-06-03 00:00:00'
    GROUP BY s.id, s.name
)
SELECT
    COUNT(*) OVER()::int AS candidate_count,
    id,
    name,
    record_count,
    mean_pm25,
    max_pm25,
    mean_aqi,
    exceedance_hours
FROM stats
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN lower(name) = 'construction building' THEN 0
        WHEN lower(name) LIKE '%construction%' AND lower(name) LIKE '%building%' THEN 1
        WHEN name LIKE '%建%' AND name LIKE '%楼%' THEN 2
        WHEN record_count > 0 THEN 3
        ELSE 4
    END,
    record_count DESC,
    name
LIMIT 10;
""")

candidates_df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
print({
    "candidate_count": int(candidates_df["candidate_count"].iloc[0]) if len(candidates_df) else 0,
    "top_candidates": candidates_df[["name", "record_count", "mean_pm25", "max_pm25", "mean_aqi", "exceedance_hours"]].to_dict("records")
})

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 按名称检索结果中与“Construction Building”最接近的站点“古冶建材楼”，计算并存储指定指标，同时汇总污染特征
query = text("""
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        h.timestamp,
        h.aqi,
        h.pm2_5,
        h.pm10,
        h.so2,
        h.no2,
        h.o3,
        h.co,
        h.air_quality_level::text AS level
    FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
    JOIN air_quality_station s ON h.station_id = s.id
    WHERE s.name = '古冶建材楼'
      AND h.timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2025-06-02 00:00:00'
      AND h.timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2025-06-03 00:00:00'
),
summary AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(*)::int AS record_count,
        AVG(pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
        MAX(pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
        AVG(aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
        SUM(CASE WHEN pm2_5 > 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours,
        MIN(pm2_5)::float AS min_pm25,
        AVG(pm10)::float AS mean_pm10,
        MAX(pm10)::float AS max_pm10,
        AVG(so2)::float AS mean_so2,
        AVG(no2)::float AS mean_no2,
        AVG(o3)::float AS mean_o3,
        AVG(co)::float AS mean_co,
        MIN(aqi)::int AS min_aqi,
        MAX(aqi)::int AS max_aqi
    FROM base
),
peak_pm25 AS (
    SELECT timestamp AS peak_pm25_time, pm2_5 AS peak_pm25, aqi AS peak_pm25_aqi
    FROM base
    WHERE pm2_5 IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY pm2_5 DESC, timestamp
    LIMIT 1
),
peak_aqi AS (
    SELECT timestamp AS peak_aqi_time, aqi AS peak_aqi, pm2_5 AS peak_aqi_pm25
    FROM base
    WHERE aqi IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY aqi DESC, timestamp
    LIMIT 1
),
level_counts AS (
    SELECT level, COUNT(*)::int AS hours
    FROM base
    GROUP BY level
),
period_stats AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN '00-05'
            WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 6 AND 11 THEN '06-11'
            WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) BETWEEN 12 AND 17 THEN '12-17'
            ELSE '18-23'
        END AS period,
        COUNT(*)::int AS hours,
        AVG(pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
        AVG(aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
        MAX(pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25
    FROM base
    GROUP BY period
)
SELECT
    s.*,
    pp.peak_pm25_time,
    pp.peak_pm25_aqi,
    pa.peak_aqi_time,
    pa.peak_aqi,
    pa.peak_aqi_pm25,
    COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_object_agg(level, hours) FROM level_counts), '{}'::jsonb)::text AS level_hours,
    COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('period', period, 'hours', hours, 'mean_pm25', mean_pm25, 'mean_aqi', mean_aqi, 'max_pm25', max_pm25) ORDER BY period) FROM period_stats), '[]'::jsonb)::text AS period_stats
FROM summary s
LEFT JOIN peak_pm25 pp ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN peak_aqi pa ON TRUE;
""")

analysis_df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
r = analysis_df.iloc[0]

mean_pm25 = float(r["mean_pm25"]) if pd.notna(r["mean_pm25"]) else None
max_pm25 = float(r["max_pm25"]) if pd.notna(r["max_pm25"]) else None
mean_aqi = float(r["mean_aqi"]) if pd.notna(r["mean_aqi"]) else None
exceedance_hours = int(r["exceedance_hours"]) if pd.notna(r["exceedance_hours"]) else 0

print({
    "matched_station_used": "古冶建材楼",
    "record_count": int(r["record_count"]),
    "mean_pm25": mean_pm25,
    "max_pm25": max_pm25,
    "mean_aqi": mean_aqi,
    "exceedance_hours": exceedance_hours,
    "min_pm25": None if pd.isna(r["min_pm25"]) else float(r["min_pm25"]),
    "mean_pm10": None if pd.isna(r["mean_pm10"]) else float(r["mean_pm10"]),
    "max_pm10": None if pd.isna(r["max_pm10"]) else float(r["max_pm10"]),
    "mean_so2": None if pd.isna(r["mean_so2"]) else float(r["mean_so2"]),
    "mean_no2": None if pd.isna(r["mean_no2"]) else float(r["mean_no2"]),
    "mean_o3": None if pd.isna(r["mean_o3"]) else float(r["mean_o3"]),
    "mean_co": None if pd.isna(r["mean_co"]) else float(r["mean_co"]),
    "min_aqi": None if pd.isna(r["min_aqi"]) else int(r["min_aqi"]),
    "max_aqi": None if pd.isna(r["max_aqi"]) else int(r["max_aqi"]),
    "peak_pm25_time": None if pd.isna(r["peak_pm25_time"]) else str(r["peak_pm25_time"]),
    "peak_pm25_aqi": None if pd.isna(r["peak_pm25_aqi"]) else int(r["peak_pm25_aqi"]),
    "peak_aqi_time": None if pd.isna(r["peak_aqi_time"]) else str(r["peak_aqi_time"]),
    "peak_aqi": None if pd.isna(r["peak_aqi"]) else int(r["peak_aqi"]),
    "peak_aqi_pm25": None if pd.isna(r["peak_aqi_pm25"]) else float(r["peak_aqi_pm25"]),
    "level_hours": r["level_hours"],
    "period_stats": r["period_stats"]
})
